uniqlo.note: Direct API with fixed x-fr-clientid=uq.ca.web-spa — 0 deals currently (no active sales on site)

zara.name: Zara Canada
zara.note: Akamai bot detection - redirects to homepage instead of sale page

adidas.name: Adidas CA
adidas.note: PerimeterX bot protection - blocks headless browsers

lululemon.note: Sale pages don't expose original prices - can't calculate discount percentage

aritzia.note: Sale page returns 404 - site structure changed or bot detection

roots.note: SFCC ISML errors on sale pages - site infrastructure issue

frankandoak.note: No compare_at_price in Shopify — cannot detect discounts

northface.name: The North Face CA
northface.note: Akamai bot protection - Access Denied on sale pages

arcteryx.name: Arc'teryx CA
arcteryx.note: Sale page moved to outlet.arcteryx.com (times out); main sale page returns 404

hm.name: H&M Canada
hm.note: Akamai 403 Forbidden on ALL requests (tested: products/list API 403, sale.html 403, men/sale.html 403, ladies/sale.html 403, even with browser+stealth — completely blocked)

americaneagle.name: American Eagle CA
americaneagle.note: Aggressive bot detection — sale pages redirect to homepage even with Playwright stealth mode (tested: API endpoints 404, DOM scraping redirected, headless/visible browser both fail)

musinsa.name: Musinsa Global
musinsa.note: Location chooser blocks automated access - cannot proceed to sale content

asos.name: ASOS
asos.note: ECONNRESET on direct fetch; XHR intercept unreliable

gap.name: Gap CA
gap.note: Sale category pages redirect to OutOfStockNoResults

levis.name: Levi's CA
levis.note: Access Denied bot block on sale URL
